sources.title: Scale AI
sources.text: # Scale AI Scale AI is a Software Development company. Scale AI delivers high quality training data for AI applications such as self-driving cars, mapping, AR/VR, robotics, and more. Scale AI employs 3,787 people (+33.2% YoY, +1601 people), founded in 2016. Headquartered in San Francisco, California, United States, operates in 88 countries (including Mexico, India, United Kingdom, Argentina, and Canada). Has $15.9B in total funding, with 9 prior funding rounds. ## About Scale’s mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world’s most important decisions. We provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world’s leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. The Scale Generative AI Platform allows customers to build, evaluate, and control advanced AI agents and applications that continuously improve. The Scale Data Engine provides the technology to collect, curate, and annotate high-quality datasets. Through our Scale Labs, we test models with rigorous benchmarks and novel research to ensure breakthroughs translate into systems people can trust. Scale powers the most advanced L

sources.title: Scale AI Raises $1 Billion Series F to Push The Frontier of AI Data
sources.text: Scale AI Raises $1 Billion Series F to Push The Frontier of AI Data May 21, 2024 6:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time # Scale AI Raises $1 Billion Series F to Push The Frontier of AI Data Share --- SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Scale AI, the data foundry for AI, today announced it has closed a $1 billion financing transaction, bringing the company to a valuation of nearly $14 billion. Existing investor Accel led the round with participation from returning investors including Y Combinator, Nat Friedman, Index Ventures, Founders Fund, Coatue, Thrive Capital, Spark Capital, NVIDIA, Tiger Global Management, Greenoaks, and Wellington Management. New investors include Cisco Investments, DFJ Growth, Intel Capital, ServiceNow Ventures, AMD Ventures, WCM, Amazon, Elad Gil, and Meta. Scale’s calling is to build the data foundry for AI. With today’s funding, the company is moving into the next phase of that journey – accelerating the abundance of frontier data that will pave our road to artificial general intelligence. Scale has a deep track record solving the data challenges of companies such as OpenAI, Meta, and Microsoft. This new funding will also enable Scale to build upon its prior model ev

sources.title: Scale Company
sources.text: # Scale Company Scale Company is a Software Development company. Scale Platform is an AI-powered solution for change management and innovation. Move faster and smarter — from idea to impact — with data-driven guidance instead of guesswork. Scale Company employs 3 people (-33.3% YoY, -2 people), founded in 2021. Headquartered in Helsinki, Finland. ## About Organizations run complex projects — transformation programs such as AI enablement, innovation portfolios, growth initiatives, change management — across spreadsheets, slide decks, and dozens of disconnected tools. Leadership lacks visibility. Teams lack direction. Decisions get made based on who presents best, not what the evidence says. Scale Platform is an AI-powered strategic execution platform that brings structure, evidence, and visibility to this work. It provides a single source of truth for your entire portfolio — every project's maturity, evidence, business case, and history in one place. At the heart of the platform is Max, an AI co-worker that understands the full context of your projects, your organization, and your strategy. Max coaches teams on what to validate next, analyzes documents, generates testable hypotheses

sources.title: Founder, Alexandr Wang, Joins Meta to Work on AI Efforts | Scale AI
sources.text: Founder, Alexandr Wang, Joins Meta to Work on AI Efforts | Scale AI # Scale AI Announces Next Phase of Company’s Evolution ·June 12, 2025·4 min read Copy Link SAN FRANCISCO, June 12, 2025 – Scale AI, Inc. (“Scale” or the “Company”), the humanity-first AI company, today announced a significant new investment from Meta Platforms, Inc. (Nasdaq: META) that values Scale at over $29 billion. The agreement will also substantially expand Scale and Meta’s commercial relationship to accelerate deployment of Scale’s data solutions. In addition, Scale’s founder, Alexandr Wang, is joining Meta to work on Meta’s AI efforts. Wang will continue to serve as a director on the Scale Board of Directors and support Scale’s ongoing work to unlock the power of AI and keep human values at the forefront. Scale’s Board of Directors has appointed Chief Strategy Officer, Jason Droege, to serve as the Company’s Interim Chief Executive Officer. Droege joined Scale in September 2024 with more than 20 years of experience building and leading iconic technology companies that improve everyday life, including Uber Eats and Axon. At Scale, Droege’s leadership has been instrumental to the growth and achievements of AI

sources.text: # Scale Media Scale Media is a Technology, Information and Internet company. SCALE MEDIA is a company that creates brands that offer effective, high-quality products along with trustworthy, cutting-edge health, wellness, and fitness-related content and tools. They aim to make a positive impact on people's lives by taking a 360-degree approach. Scale Media employs 106 people (-15.6% YoY, -24 people), founded in 2014. Headquartered in Los Angeles, California, United States, with presence in Taiwan. ## About Scale is a tech-driven company that builds next generation health and wellness DTC brands, smarter. Our full-stack omni-channel ecosystem is powered by technology using proprietary data-driven methodologies to rapidly scale. We are Scalers who believe in taking a 360-degree approach to improving people's lives through best-in-class products, education, community, and tools. We believe in giving back with multiple charitable donations. We are environmentally conscious, with responsibly sourced products, and a roadmap to sustainability. As Scalers, we are collaborative, fun, experienced, driven, and are always looking for new talent to join our diverse team. -Awarded as One of Forbe

sources.title: Scale AI Acquires ICG Solutions | National Security AI | Scale AI
sources.text: Scale AI Acquires ICG Solutions | National Security AI | Scale AI # Scale AI Acquires ICG Solutions to Accelerate National Security AI By Dan Tadross·April 20, 2026·2 min read Copy Link Scale AI is proud to announce the acquisition of ICG Solutions, a defense technology firm specializing in real-time streaming data analytics. This acquisition marks a milestone in our mission to provide the U.S. Department of War and the broader Intelligence Community with the most advanced, reliable AI infrastructure available. By formally integrating ICG’s technology with Scale’s agentic platform, we are creating a unique, end-to-end intelligence solution. This full-stack approach allows government customers to move from raw data to situational awareness and AI-driven action within a single, secure environment - a capability that is currently unmatched in the marketplace. ### 15 Years of Proven Mission Impact Since its founding in 2010, ICG has been dedicated to helping national security customers extract mission-critical value from complex, multi-source streaming data. ICG’s flagship product, LUX™, has been a critical asset for the national security community, excelling at ingesting, correlating,

sources.title: Nucleus Research Releases 2025 Full-Suite Talent Acquisition Technology Value Matrix
sources.text: Nucleus Research Releases 2025 Full-Suite Talent Acquisition Technology Value Matrix Accessibility Statement Skip Navigation Leaders in the full-suite Talent Acquisition market include Cegid, Infor, Oracle, and Paycor. MIAMI, Oct. 21, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- In 2025, full-suite talent acquisition (TA) technology continues to deliver measurable ROI through improved data centralization, automation, and user experience. For customers, unifying recruiting, workforce planning, compensation, and mobility under a single system reduces integration costs and strengthens decision-making. This holistic approach enhances visibility across the employee lifecycle, allowing organizations to make more informed hiring and retention decisions while minimizing administrative overhead. "Full-suite HCM platforms are moving beyond efficiency gains to deliver strategic hiring advantages," said Evelyn McMullen, Research Manager at Nucleus Research. "By connecting recruiting with broader workforce planning, organizations are realizing faster time-to-hire, better talent alignment, and measurable returns from streamlined operations." AI-driven automation continues to advance across the market. Vendors are relea

sources.title: ScaleOps
sources.text: # ScaleOps (ScaleOps Labs Ltd.) ScaleOps is a Software Development company. ScaleOps is an automated Kubernetes resource optimization company that provides real-time, context-aware application automation built for critical, production-grade environments. ScaleOps employs 111 people (+88.4% YoY, +61 people), founded in 2022. Headquartered in New York, New York, United States, operates in 5 countries (including Israel, United Kingdom, Canada, and Philippines). Has $209.5M in total funding, with 5 prior funding rounds. ## About ScaleOps is redefining cloud resource management from the ground up. Led by a team of cloud infrastructure experts and built for critical production environments, ScaleOps is on a mission to build the Cloud Operating System for the AI era, one that unlocks efficiency and scale while maximizing performance in critical and complex production environments. By bringing real-time, application context-aware automation to cloud resource management, the ScaleOps platform helps organizations eliminate waste, reduce costs, and run critical applications with confidence across any environment. ## Company Details - Industry: Software Development - Type: Privately Held - Hea

sources.title: Scale AI Signs MOU with DOE to Advance the Genesis Mission | Scale AI
sources.text: Scale AI Signs MOU with DOE to Advance the Genesis Mission | Scale AI # Scale AI Signs MOU with DOE to Advance the Genesis Mission By The Scale Team·May 1, 2026·4 min read Copy Link Today, Scale AI is proud to formalize our partnership with the U.S. Department of Energy through a Memorandum of Understanding in support of the Genesis Mission, a national effort to unlock scientific discovery through advanced AI and computing. The Department of Energy’s Genesis Mission is an ambitious initiative to create an integrated platform capable of harnessing the federal government's vast datasets for scientific discovery and innovation. This MOU creates a framework for collaboration on topics across AI and advanced computing, including information sharing and future joint projects in support of Genesis. Scale has also engaged on the Genesis Mission through responses to Requests for Information from the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy and DOE. While Genesis marks a major step toward strengthening energy independence and accelerating innovation for national security, a critical objective in the initiative, apart from compute and models, is making its vast scientific datasets

sources.title: Scale AI’s Series E: Deploying AI Across Every Industry
sources.text: Scale AI’s Series E: Deploying AI Across Every Industry 13 Apr 2021 - 29 Apr 2026 | Jan | FEB | Mar | | --- | --- | --- | | 27 | | 2024 | 2025 | 2026 | success fail About this capture COLLECTED BY TIMESTAMPS The Wayback Machine - https://web.archive.org/web/20250227144927/https://scale.com/blog/series-e Company # Scale AI’s Series E: Deploying AI Across Every Industry by on April 13, 2021 When we started Scale nearly five years ago, our mission was to accelerate the development of AI. Today, I’m proud to say that we’re seeing this mission come to life, as customers across industries, from finance to e-commerce to transportation to government, are shipping AI projects that touch our everyday lives. But we’re still just scratching the surface of the potential that AI has to transform every business and industry, which is why we’re happy to share that Scale has raised $325 million in Series E funding, co-led by Dragoneer, Greenoaks Capital, and Tiger Global. Additional new investors in the round include Wellington Management and Durable Capital followed by existing investors Coatue, Index, Founders Fund, and YC. sources.title: Scale AI confirms 'significant' investment from Meta, says CEO Alexandr Wang is leaving | TechCrunch
sources.text: Scale AI confirms 'significant' investment from Meta, says CEO Alexandr Wang is leaving | TechCrunch –:–:–:– The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. Buy one Disrupt pass, and get the second at 50% off. Ends May 8. Register now. Image Credits:Drew Angerer / Getty Images # Scale AI confirms ‘significant’ investment from Meta, says CEO Alexandr Wang is leaving 12:12 AM PDT · June 13, 2025 Data-labeling company Scale AI confirmed on Friday that it has received a “significant” investment from Meta that values the startup at $29 billion. The startup also said its co-founder and CEO Alexandr Wang is stepping down from his role to join Meta and help the bigger company with its AI work. Reports indicate that Meta invested about $14.3 billion for a 49% stake in the startup, which produces and labels data that’s used to train the large language models that underpin a significant portion of generative AI development. Meta confirmed the investment. “Meta has finalized our strategic partnership and investment in Scale AI. As part of this, we will deepen the work we do together producing data for AI models and Alexandr Wang will join Meta to work on

With today’s funding, the company is moving into the next phase of that journey – accelerating the abundance of frontier data that will pave our road to artificial general intelligence. Scale has a deep track record solving the data challenges of companies such as OpenAI, Meta, and Microsoft. This new funding will also enable Scale to build upon its prior model evaluation work with enterprise customers

sources.text: Meta bets big on start-up Scale AI with €12 billion investment and hires its co-founder | Euronews Top-ranked Jannik Sinner forced out of French Open due to heat Judge refuses to block Trump order to create federal voter list Top News Stories Today Latest news bulletin | May 28th, 2026 – Evening Brussels faces backlash over carbon trading system as costs soar Top-ranked Jannik Sinner forced out of French Open due to heat Judge refuses to block Trump order to create federal voter list Top News Stories Today Latest news bulletin | May 28th, 2026 – Evening Brussels faces backlash over carbon trading system as costs soar Advertisement By&nbspEuronews with AP Published on 13/06/2025 - 14:45 GMT+2 Share Comments Share ## Scale AI has helped major tech companies such as OpenAI, Google, and Microsoft prepare the data they use to train AI models. sources.title: Scale AI's Alexandr Wang in the Driver's Seat With Meta Deal
sources.text: Scale AI's Alexandr Wang in the Driver's Seat With Meta Deal SubscribeSign in # Scale AI's Alexandr Wang in the Driver's Seat With Meta Deal ### Plus, startup Handshake and others take aim at Scale as human training of LLMs becomes more critical Tom Dotan and Eric Newcomer Jun 10, 2025 36 4 Share ## Wang Sells But Keeps Control of Scale AI Once news of Meta’s investment in Scale broke, the myriad discussions rattling around the startup and AI world — and even among Scale’s own investors — could be boiled down to this: is this an Inflection, or is it an OpenAI? That is to say, did Meta invest approximately $15 billion in Scale to supercharge an outside startup while reaping some of the benefits and casting off its image as an AI stumbler (Microsoft-OpenAI). Or did it poach the CEO and top leadership of a startup to bring that talent in house, while paying off investors and sucking the life-force from the remaining company, (Microsoft-Inflection). Newcomer is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Subscribe Scale’s pitch to its investors was the former, one of them told us. And a key way to understand tha
